entity.summary: BNB Smart Chain automated-market-maker exchange focused on early-stage projects, with token swaps, liquidity pools, farms, and related ecosystem products.
entity.notes: HEI uses 2021-06-01 as a month-level launch marker. First-party roadmap material records the exchange launch among the project's earliest completed milestones, while a partner campaign confirms public liquidity use by mid-June 2021. Current market tracking shows continuing trades and multiple live pairs.

events.title: BabySwap launched on BNB Smart Chain
events.description: BabySwap entered public operation as an automated-market-maker exchange with swaps, liquidity pools, farms, and trade-mining functions.
events.notes: The exact launch day was not recovered. The date is normalized to the start of June 2021 from the official roadmap and documented public liquidity use by June 16.

evidence.title: BabySwap roadmap
evidence.notes: First-party roadmap places the exchange, farm, pool, and trade-mining launch among the project's earliest completed milestones after its first public post in May 2021.

evidence.title: ONTO Gives Birth to New Partnership with BabySwap
evidence.notes: Official partner announcement documents a live BabySwap liquidity campaign beginning June 16, 2021, confirming public operation by mid-June.

evidence.title: BabySwap exchange documentation
evidence.notes: Current first-party documentation describes BabySwap as a non-custodial automated-market-maker exchange with token swaps and liquidity pools.

evidence.title: BabySwap exchange markets and volume
evidence.notes: Current exchange profile reports active trading pairs and non-zero recent volume, supporting active status.
